supporting_quote: IRF5 RNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: THP-1 in-vitro screen normalized to total RNA via RiboGreen. GAPDH+ACTB normalization appears ONLY in the KARPAS-229 xenograft model (Table 55), not the THP-1 dataset rows. Verified by hand after the auto-classifier false-flagged ACTB.
